ek. Meet 1:1 with staff to talk about how to prepare for exams, navigate CS, Berkeley, and (almost) anything you want! We still have open slots for our tutoring sections ! This is highly recommended to get a head start on prepping for the Midterm. ol

o get a head start on prepping for the Midterm. older newer Announcements: Friday, February 13 Happy Friday the 13th! 👻 No classes next Monday (no lecture, lab, or tutoring). If you have a Monday lab, your attendance credit will automatically be give

your attendance credit will automatically be given to you. If you wish, feel free to pop into any Tuesday lab ! Sign up for Exam Prep Tutoring ! These small group sections led by a tutor are a great way to prep for the next midterm. Homework 3 has b

way to prep for the next midterm. Homework 3 has been released! Come by office hours next week if you would like to review your Quest. older newer Announcements: Wednesday, February 11 Prof. Garcia's OH moved to Mon 2-3pm @ Soda 777. An Ed announceme

orrow. Find more information on Ed . We will allow switching into this section until next Wednesday. older newer Announcements: Monday, February 9 The Quest is taking place from Monday through Wednesday! There will be no lab or lecture Monday and Tue

ay! There will be no lab or lecture Monday and Tuesday. Lecture and Discussion resume Wednesday (2/11). There is no Monday Instructor OH or regular OH Monday-Wednesday Reminder that your Quest is a quiz! Missing your Quest slot without a valid reason

iz! Missing your Quest slot without a valid reason means that you will receive a 0. If you are unable to take the Quest for a valid reason, please email cs61a@berkeley.edu before your slot. older newer Announcements: Friday, February 6 This is your l
